thi4:1.0.63: p_19Th2_103"Putto buddhassa dāyādo,kassapo susamāhito;Pubbenivāsaṁ yovedi,saggāpāyañca passati.
thi4:1.0.64: p_19Th2_104Atho jātikkhayaṁ patto,abhiññāvosito muni;Etāhi tīhi vijjāhi,tevijjo hoti brāhmaṇo.
thi4:1.0.65: p_19Th2_105Tatheva bhaddā kāpilānī,tevijjā maccuhāyinī;Dhāreti antimaṁ dehaṁ,jetvā māraṁ savāhiniṁ.
thi4:1.0.66: p_19Th2_106Disvā ādīnavaṁ loke,ubho pabbajitā mayaṁ;Tyamha khīṇāsavā dantā,sītibhūtamha nibbutā"ti.
